Profile Overview

SIVEL POKER ACCOUNT

Sign In

Your online bankroll, profile, levels, and future public-table progress follow you across devices.

New accounts begin with 10,000 Sivel Chips. Online table buy-ins and payouts are handled by the server and recorded in PostgreSQL.

INVITE-ONLY POKER

Private Games

Create a private cash table or join a friend with a four-character room code.

Create a Room

Choose the table setup, then share the generated room code with your players.

Playing as Signed-in player

Join a Room

Enter the code provided by the host. Your server bankroll will fund the table buy-in.

How to Play

Choose a 2–6 player table. Every seat receives two private cards and shares five community cards. Build the strongest five-card hand.

The dealer button moves after each hand. Blinds and action rotate around the table. Multiway all-ins create proper side pots, and folded players cannot win them.

Your buy-in is deducted when you sit. Winning the entire table cashes the remaining table chips into your bankroll. Leaving early cashes out your current uncommitted stack.
